mainPencereDesc: Instantly show or hide the application from anywhere.
windowModeToggleDesc: Toggles between Mini Mode and Main Application mode.
openSettingsDesc: Quickly triggers this window from anywhere.
newChatDesc: Instantly start a new Gemini chat without waiting.
runInBackgroundDesc: Minimize the application to the system tray when close button is pressed.
startAtStartupDesc: Start the application automatically when system session opens.
miniAlwaysOnTopDesc: Keeps the mini window on top of all other windows.
